verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.49 CAD. Core is 10.1% vs 40% target — $1,873 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.8%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above zone; PLTR above no-chase.
